name: Ground Beef with Cactus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef until fully heated through and browned.
2. Drain any excess grease from the pan.
3. Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until softened.
4. Mix in the drained cactus and diced tomatoes with chilies.
5. Simmer the mixture for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
